name: Skills System
description: Allows users to define reusable instruction blocks ('skills') that get injected into task prompts. Supports global and per-project skills with enable/disable toggles and a dedicated editor dialog.

Dialogs/SkillEditorDialog.cs.content:
class SkillEditorDialog
  Show(SkillManager skillManager, string? projectPath) -> bool

Managers/SkillManager.cs.content:
class SkillManager
  LoadAsync(string? projectPath = null) -> Task
  SaveSkill(SkillEntry skill, string? projectPath = null) -> void
  DeleteSkill(SkillEntry skill, string? projectPath = null) -> void
  BuildSkillsBlock() -> string
  BuildSkillsBlock(IEnumerable<string> skillIds) -> string
  GetEnabledSkillIds() -> List<string>
  SetEnabledSkills(IEnumerable<string> skillIds) -> void
  ClearEnabledSkills() -> void
  GetCategories() -> List<string>
  Id: string
  Name: string
  Description: string
  Category: string
  IsGlobal: bool
  CreatedAt: DateTime
  UpdatedAt: DateTime

patterns: Skill IDs tracked in TaskConfigBase for per-task enablement
